description_long: This shotgun features a classic design with a wooden full stock and fore-end, both displaying a rich brown wood grain texture. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with the receiver finished in a light, matte silver tone and the barrel in a darker, gunmetal gray. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it, and a front sight bead at the muzzle. The pump-action fore-end is ribbed for grip and matches the stock in color and material. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, with a blend of wood and metal components typical of traditional pump-action shotguns.
description: A traditional pump-action shotgun with a brown wooden stock and fore-end, metallic receiver, and a long, dark barrel with a tubular magazine beneath.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, ribbed pump fore-end, and the long barrel with a front sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the tubular magazine beneath, with minimal visibility of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same wooden and metallic features, with the pump and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube, with the receiver and trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
